description: This understated bow-detailed pair will charm you out of your haughty stilettos! Parade your girly appeal this summer with pastel shades and this pair of sandals for a sophisticated finish. Heel: 3" Upper Forefoot straps featuring a bow detail on top Padded footbed with a brand patch at the heel Outsole TPU outsole with a heel patch Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
